title: Youtube Poop:  Squadala Introduces Diet and Exercise to the King
description:
You guessed it.  Another video about what's for dinner.
Uploaded the same day Walrusguy uploaded his last video.  Sad isn't it.
Video sources:
Zelda Cd-i
Chariots of Fire
Audio Sources:
Drum being hit in Coraline theme
That's Amore 
Chariots of Fire theme
Mother 3 Music (One is from outside of Saturn Valley and the other is the victory theme)
Street Fighter cartoon M. Bison
Earthbound: Kraken of the Sea
